creator: jau@iki.fi
text:
This is a simple port update from mod_geoip2_1.1.7 to mod_geoip2_1.1.8.

Fix: 

Change PORTVERSION and PORTREVISION in ports/www/mod_geoip2/Makefile to
PORTVERSION=    1.1.8
PORTREVISION=   0

Modify ports/www/mod_geoip2/distinfo to contain
MD5 (mod_geoip2_1.1.8.tar.gz) = 165607221c6a95ace7d840c5aea39696
SHA256 (mod_geoip2_1.1.8.tar.gz) = 19bd8fd3ccbbe687afab051bc3c5cbf8db0202123988a3104f0b93cb8c94f3e4
SIZE (mod_geoip2_1.1.8.tar.gz) = 7483
How-To-Repeat: Version update only.
